title: 3D Skellies
description: Makes vanilla and wither skeletons, skeleton horses, bogged, and strays 3D!! Crazy, right? (ﾉ◕ヮ◕)ﾉ*:･ﾟ✧
body: ### Try ->this version<- if you use Fresh Animations ## 3D Skellies Makes vanilla and Wither Skeletons, Skeleton Horses, Bogged, and Strays 3D!! (I will work on skeletons from other mods/resource packs if there's demand on discord) ## Compatibility #### Requires EMF and ETF I've only tested this resource pack with a few versions to check compatibility, so if you test it with any version please let me know on discord if it works or breaks! That way I can fix bugs and add more versions. Thank you so much! ## Issues [![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49eac7d4916630c1ca7a85fe90f40e2363ae80eb.png)](https://discord.gg/W3T34eVScQ)
